Company Profile

Who
We Are

Full-service general contractor specializing in critical buildings and infrastructure since 2013. Proudly Veteran Owned & Operated — running on the same principles upheld in military service: Loyalty, Confidence, and Intelligence.

Core Competencies

  • General Construction — Full-service GC for critical federal and military facilities
  • Design-Build — Integrated A/E and construction from concept to completion
  • Self-Performing Low Voltage — In-house installation, no subcontracting
  • Electronic Security Systems — Access control, CCTV, intrusion, intercom, network integration
  • Secure Environments — Experienced in classified, active-operations, and healthcare settings

Self-Performing Capabilities

Access Control Systems

Card readers, biometrics, ACE controllers, and centralized access management.

Video Surveillance (CCTV)

HD camera systems with NVR, real-time monitoring — interior and rooftop.

Intrusion Detection

Motion sensors, door contacts, and alarm systems integrated with central monitoring.

Emergency Communications

Intercom, PA (70V), and mass notification for emergency response coordination.

Structured Cabling + Network

Copper, fiber, switches, servers — full network infrastructure supporting security systems.

Our Commitment

Safety & Quality
Without Compromise

  • OSHA-Compliant Operations — Full compliance on every federal site
  • EM 385 Certified — USACE Safety & Health for military construction
  • Dedicated Site Safety Officers — On-site monitoring and continuous enforcement
  • Zero Safety Incidents — Perfect record across all completed projects

Quality Assured

Structured QC Program

Documented inspections, testing, and verification at every project phase.

Submittal & RFI Management

Streamlined documentation ensuring timely approvals and issue resolution.

Security Clearance Coordination

Expert management of access protocols for classified and sensitive environments.
